item.title: Acme signs a supply contract
item.description: Acme Corp announced a new supply agreement with Globex.
item.content:encoded: Acme Corp announced a new supply contract with Globex Inc.
item.dc:creator: Markets Desk

item.title: North River Metals restarts nickel plant
item.description: North River Metals restarted its nickel plant.
item.content:encoded: Management said output should recover this quarter.
item.dc:creator: Commodities Desk
